differential_diagnoses: Euglycemic diabetic ketoacidosis (secondary to SGLT2 inhibitor use)
High anion gap metabolic acidosis due to 5-oxoprolinemia (pyroglutamic acidosis)
Type B lactic acidosis due to tissue hypoperfusion or malignancy
Acute kidney injury with superimposed metabolic acidosis
next_steps: Obtain arterial blood gas and calculate serum anion gap and osmolal gap
Measure plasma lactate and serum beta-hydroxybutyrate levels
Continue aggressive supportive care with optimization of hemodynamic status
